has had his opportunity to recover - if he can and will.

pg164-p2-s1: Still you may say: "But I will not have the benefit of contact with you who write this book."
pg164-p2-s3:
God
will determine that, so you must remember that your real reliance is always upon Him.
pg164-p2-s4:
He will show you how to create the
fellowship you crave.
pg164-p2:
Still you may say: "But I will not have the benefit of contact with you who write this book." We cannot be sure. God
will determine that, so you must remember that your real reliance is always upon Him. He will show you how to create the
fellowship you crave.
pg164-p3-s1: Our book is meant to be suggestive only.
pg164-p3-s2: We realize we know only a little.
pg164-p3-s3:
God will constantly disclose more to you and
to us.
pg164-p3-s4: Ask Him in your morning meditation what you can do each day for the man who is still sick.
pg164-p3-s5:
The answers will come,
if your own house is in order.
pg164-p3-s6: But obviously you cannot transmit something you haven't got.
pg164-p3-s7:
See to it that your
relationship with Him is right, and great events will come to pass for you and countless others.
pg164-p3-s8:
This is the Great Fact
for us.
pg164-p3:
Our book is meant to be suggestive only. We realize we know only a little. God will constantly disclose more to you and
to us. Ask Him in your morning meditation what you can do each day for the man who is still sick. The answers will come,
if your own house is in order. But obviously you cannot transmit something you haven't got. See to it that your
relationship with Him is right, and great events will come to pass for you and countless others. This is the Great Fact
for us.
pg164-p4-s1: Abandon yourself to God as you understand God.
pg164-p4-s2: Admit your faults to Him and to your fellows.
pg164-p4-s3:
Clear away the wreckage of
your past.
pg164-p4-s4: Give freely of what you find and join us.
pg164-p4-s5:
We shall be with you in the Fellowship of the Spirit, and you will
surely meet some of us as you trudge the Road of Happy Destiny.
pg164-p4:
Abandon yourself to God as you understand God. Admit your faults to Him and to your fellows. Clear away the wreckage of
your past. Give freely of what you find and join us. We shall be with you in the Fellowship of the Spirit, and you will
surely meet some of us as you trudge the Road of Happy Destiny.
pg164-p5-s1: May God bless you and keep you - until then.
pg164-p5: May God bless you and keep you - until then.
